title: Largest root residual buckets
objective: Classify and reduce the largest root-only residual buckets without weakening structural parity or adding ungoverned per-string measurement constants.
stop_conditions: an apparent fix requires broad renderer contract changes
a residual is only browser/font lattice drift with no generated measurement path
side_effect_policy: Keep changes diagram-scoped and record evidence in EVIDENCE_AND_GATES.md before marking tasks done.
